title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at H&M India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at H&M India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
H&M India Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About H&M India Global Group:
H&M India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H&M India Global Group!
